name: Anthony Jeselnik
bio: Anthony Jeselnik is an American comedian and writer known for dark comedy built on ironic misdirection, taboo subjects, and an arrogant stage persona. He wrote for Late Night with Jimmy Fallon and the Comedy Central Roasts before hosting his own series, The Jeselnik Offensive. He has released a string of acclaimed specials including Thoughts and Prayers and Fire in the Maternity Ward.

timeline.ev: Writes for Late Night with Jimmy Fallon and hosts Comedy Central Presents
The Jeselnik Offensive premieres; releases Caligula
Releases first Netflix special, Thoughts and Prayers
Releases the Netflix special Fire in the Maternity Ward

accolades: Performer at the Comedy Central Roast of Donald Trump
Acclaimed Netflix specials Thoughts and Prayers and Fire in the Maternity Ward
Host of The Jeselnik Offensive on Comedy Central

bits.t: Grandma Got the Last Laugh With a Bible Prank
His Dad Was a Little Too Strict
